articles.description: Jagan was addressing YSRCP leaders on the occasion of the party’s Formation Day celebrations at its central office in Tadepalli in Guntur district

articles.description: Caught on CCTV Elderly dragged beaten by neighbours over fence dispute in UP

articles.title: Aari Aari song from Dhurandhar: The Revenge is the new Punjabi party anthem

articles.title: CPR training for 400 Indian Army personnel in Bengaluru on March 13
articles.description: The session will be conducted by the International Critical Air Transfer Team (ICATT) Foundation in association with Society for Emergency Medicine in India (SEMI)

articles.title: LPG shortage: Samridhi@Kochi feels the heat as cooking gas supply dries up in Kerala
articles.description: Samridhi’s central kitchen at Paramara Road in Ernakulam North, along with its Fort Kochi outlet and three canteens are currently reportedly operating on the last lot of 30-odd commercial LPG cylinders arranged by the Corporation as an emergency measure

topStories.title: Iran-US war: Citi, StanChart evacuate Dubai offices; HSBC shuts Qatar branches
topStories.description: Citigroup and Standard Chartered are evacuating their Dubai offices and asking staff to work from home, following threats from Iran to target Gulf banking interests.

topStories.title: Opposition MPs protest in Parliament complex over shortage of commercial LPG cylinders
topStories.description: Rahul Gandhi alleged that the Prime Minister is panicked because of the Epstein files issue and the Adani Case in the U.S.

topStories.title: SC says parental income alone cannot determine OBC creamy layer status: ‘Not to create artificial distinction…’
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has ruled that OBC creamy layer status cannot be decided solely on parental income, and that treating children of PSU and private sector employees differently from government servants for reservation eligibility amounts to hostile discrimination.

topStories.title: Supreme Court grants bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in terror funding case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has granted bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in a case related to terror funding.

topStories.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
topStories.description: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.

topStories.title: Income can’t be sole criterion to determine OBC creamy layer: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The court said that adopting an interpretation that disadvantages one segment of the same backward class without rational justification would amount to treating “equals as unequals”

topStories.title: ‘Only way to end this war is...’ Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian reiterates key demands for truce with US
topStories.description: After launching Operation Epic Fury, the US and Israel have struggled to change Iran's leadership despite military successes. Iran insists on not seeking a ceasefire, and regional tensions rise as Gulf states push for peace amid increasing oil prices.

topStories.title: Supreme Court comes down heavily on discharging patients ‘against medical advice’
topStories.description: The Supreme Court said hospitals sometimes resort to such discharges when curative treatment is no longer possible

topStories.title: Global Market | Anurag Singh on what could decide the market’s next move
topStories.description: Rising oil prices and West Asian tensions are creating market volatility, with investors watching energy flows and geopolitical strategy. Market expert Anurag Singh believes the US and Israel aim to dismantle Iran's capabilities and secure the Strait of Hormuz. Equity markets have priced in weaker earnings, but emergency oil releases offer a temporary reprieve.

topStories.title: Pentagon reportedly blocked photographers from US-Iran conflict briefings over ‘unflattering’ photos of Pete Hegseth
topStories.description: Photographers from the Associated Press, Reuters, and Getty Images were banned after the media houses published photos of Hegseth speaking to the media after a March 2 press conference with the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

topStories.title: Parliament Budget session LIVE: Lok Sabha to discuss and vote on demands for grants under Railway Ministry
topStories.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge on Wednesday demanded that Prime Minister Narendra Modi respond in Parliament to the emerging economic impact of the conflict in West Asia

topStories.title: Gold, silver prices today: Silver falls Rs 2,000, gold marginally lower as firm dollar outweighs safe-haven demand. What should investors do?
topStories.description: Gold and silver prices moved down on Thursday as a firmer US dollar weighed on bullion demand. On the MCX, silver fell over Rs 2,000 per kg while gold declined marginally. Analysts expect continued volatility amid currency fluctuations, geopolitical tensions and crude oil price movements, advising investors to wait before initiating fresh positions.

dailyNews.title: IndiGo to operate more flights to 9 Middle East nations amid US-Iran war | Check full list of flights on 12 March
dailyNews.description: Global air travel has remained severely disrupted after the war in Iran forced the closure of key Middle Eastern hubs, including Dubai, Doha and Abu Dhabi, stranding tens of thousands of passengers.

dailyNews.title: Dr Oz helps older woman who collapsed during Trump's speech at Kentucky event
dailyNews.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz sprang into action during President Donald Trump’s speech in Kentucky when an older woman collapsed, prompting the president to pause his remarks and call for assistance.

dailyNews.title: CNN's Abby Phillip issues on-air correction, says she takes 'full responsibility' for Mamdani flub

dailyNews.title: Italy win over Mexico sends Team USA to WBC quarterfinals
dailyNews.description: Italy defeated Mexico to advance in World Baseball Classic, while saving Team USA's tournament hopes with their crucial victory in Houston.

dailyNews.title: Giants co-owner Steve Tisch, siblings look to transfer equity stake to children’s trusts, NFL memo shows
dailyNews.description: New York Giants co-owners Steve Tisch, Laurie Tisch and Jonathan Tisch submitted a request to transfer their 23.1% stake to their children's trusts.

dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.description: Catastrophe in Cuba is not a foregone conclusion.

dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits ships in and near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic sues Trump administration over "supply chain risk" order
dailyNews.description: Anthropic sued the Defense Department and other federal agencies on Monday over the government's move to designate it a risk to the supply chain.

dailyNews.title: Trump releasing 172 million barrels of oil from reserve as prices soar amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered the release of 172 million barrels of oil from the U.S.'s Strategic Petroleum Reserve on Wednesday, after oil prices rocketed to their highest levels in years amid the U.S.'s war with Iran.
